candidate_check.description: The Red Hat Enterprise Linux operating system must not have the rsh-server package installed.

check_content_excerpt:
Check to see if the rsh-server package is installed with the following command:

# yum list installed rsh-server

If the rsh-server package is installed, this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt:
Configure the operating system to disable non-essential capabilities by removing the rsh-server package from the system with the following command:

# yum remove rsh-server
title: The Red Hat Enterprise Linux operating system must not have the rsh-server package installed.
